title: Maximum Number Of Tasks You Can Assign
description: Assign each worker at most one task and each task once; at most pills workers gain strength. Return the maximum completed task count. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: tasks: list[int], workers: list[int], pills: int, strength: int. tasks and workers lengths <=50000; values,strength<=1e9; 0<=pills<=len(workers); inputs may be sorted in place.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
